title: Her · हेर — a detective for your Claude Code sessions
summary: Her (हेर) 是一个为 Claude Code 会话设计的侦探式调试工具，通过分析会话日志帮助开发者快速定位问题根源，提升调试效率。
highlights: Her acts as a detective for your Claude Code sessions, analyzing logs to pinpoint issues.
Designed to streamline debugging by providing insights into session behavior.
Built as part of a small hackathon project, showcasing practical AI integration.
